instruction: Apply the approval policy to this quote request and return the required decision.
rationale_hint: Gates pass; B1 +5 %, B2 +3 %; effective 13 %; quote amount $250,000 > $200,000. P2 fires → ESCALATE_REGIONAL_VP. P2 takes precedence over P4, which would have selected ESCALATE_DIRECTOR for the 13 % bracket.

provenance.source_benchmark: CRMArena-Pro Workflow Execution (Huang et al., 2025); World of Workflows Constraint Understanding (Skyfall Research, 2025); WorkBench no-action subset (Styles et al., 2024); FlowBench rule-following (Xiao et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed quote request and approval policy; task semantics follow the rule-application + no-action pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: precedence_P2_over_P4.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (rule set, quote requests, task design); benchmark semantics reference only
